description: Juno PM — starter Langflow agent for the AI Product Management Certification. Import into Langflow and add your own OpenAI API key. Single-agent ReAct pattern that triages a P0 thread into a top-3 risk list with citations.
name: Juno PM — P0 Triage Agent (Starter)

data.label: Slack P0 thread
data.description: Paste the raw Slack thread for testing. In production this is fed by a webhook on #escalations.

data.label: Juno system prompt
data.template:
You are Juno PM, an AI Associate PM embedded in RocketShip's Slack/Notion/Jira. You operate as a risk watchdog. For the attached P0 thread:

1. Identify the top 3 risks.
2. For each risk, cite the message index that supports it.
3. Score each risk 1-5 for severity. If confidence < 70%, mark NEEDS PM REVIEW.
4. Never invent customer names, ARR, or contracts.
5. Output a markdown table: Rank | Risk | Confidence | Source idx | Suggested action.

Thread:
{thread}

data.label: RAG retriever (placeholder)
data.description: Replace with a real vector store. Default: pgvector + text-embedding-3-large. Top-k = 10.

data.label: GPT-4-class model
data._note: Add your OPENAI_API_KEY as a Langflow environment variable.

data.label: Auto-post to #pm-daily
data._note: Stub. Replace with a real Slack tool integration.

data.label: Hand-off to #pm-juno-review
data._note: Stub. Replace with a real Slack tool integration.

_readme.purpose: Starter Langflow export for the optional M5 post-class lab. Mirrors the AWSpec — ReAct pattern, single agent, confidence-based handoff.
tools_required: OpenAI API key (~$5 credit is enough for the lab)
what_to_change: Replace the 'RAG retriever (placeholder)' with a real vector store of the RocketShip corpus.
Replace the 'auto-post' and 'hand-off' SlackPost nodes with real Slack tool integrations or your own webhook.
Adjust the confidence threshold in the guardrail node based on your eval data (M6).
